mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in the unemployment rate signals tightening labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings expectations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE declines > 0.5pp over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and housing starts indicates expanding real economic activity that drives corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint growth of INDPRO and HOUST fails to generate positive 20d SPX returns in > 50% of cases, or their correlation with SPX returns drops below 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in real private domestic demand (as measured by GDP) predicts recessionary risks that depress S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances where GDPC1 declines > 1% over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation expectations (as measured by CPI) lead to higher real interest rates that discount future equity cash flows, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL rises > 0.5% over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production growth signals robust corporate capital expenditures that drive long-term earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to generate positive 60d SPX returns in > 50% of cases, or its predictive power drops below 0.10 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth combined with low unemployment signals a tight labor market that drives wage inflation and corporate margin pressures, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint behavior of PAYEMS and UNRATE fails to produce negative 20d SPX returns in > 50% of cases, or their combined predictive power drops below 0.12.

mechanism_narrative: High consumer spending (as measured by RSAFS) combined with strong housing starts indicates sustained demand expansion that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint growth of RSAFS and HOUST fails to generate positive 20d SPX returns in > 50% of cases, or their correlation with SPX returns drops below 0.15.
